title: Week 6 Overview
html:
Week 6 Overview

Day 26
1. Express the result of an action (verb in て form + います)
2. Use of に (frequency)
3. Focus on the expressions maitoshi, maitsuki, yoku (毎年、毎月、よく)
4. Three new kanji: 会, 社, 員

Day 27
1. Use て form + kudasai to express instruction/request/progress
2. Use of は (indication of a subject)
3. Grammar focus もういちど, すぐ (time), どうぞ, どうも (greeting)
4. Katakana for rooms

Day 28
1. Use of the form て+もいいです (is ok to, may I?)
2. Use of the form て+はいけません  (must do, need to do)
3. Three new kanji: 車, 百, 千

Day 29
1. Use of the form verb1て+verb2て to express sequence in actions
2. Verb 1 て から　+ V2 to express an action after doing another action
3. Grammar focus on the use of どうやって, すぐ, さきに, もうすこし
4. Katakana for desserts

Day 30
1. Verbs in たform
2. た＋ことがあります（to have (ever) done something, to have experienced doing something）
3. Grammar focus on と to specify the partner in an action
4. Use of  何 + classifier + も　(a number of…)
5. Counting occurrences of an action (なんかい, いっかい )
6. Three new kanji: 万, 円, 毎
